programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Abandoned by his wife and faced with financial ruin, local farmer Richard Harvey finally reaches the end of his tether, and heads into Aidensfield to air his grievances in a particularly memorable way. Meanwhile, the arrival of a handsome stranger sets Gina's heart racing - but he could be a dangerous criminal. Vernon and David branch out into a new line of business, and soon manage to pep up a few palates with Aunt Beth's tangy horseradish sauce(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a seminar in Australia and learns that she may have an inheritance claim to a piece of land there that has traditionally been used for sheep grazing. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar return as detectives Cassie and Sunny, investigating another emotionally charged cold case. When the body of a teenage girl who went missing at the turn of the millennium is found at a building site off the M1, four old schoolfriends are placed under the spotlight and their relationships are tested to the limit. With Alex Jennings, Kevin R McNally, Neil Morrissey and James Fleet(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Cassie and Sunny go in search of Hayley's family as the press begin to take an interest in the story. A detective who was involved in the original investigation offers his thoughts on why her disappearance remained unsolved, pointing out that Hayley's boyfriend was suspected of the crime but was never charged. The distance between where Hayley was last seen and where her body was found leads Cassie to form a new theory - that the killer may have travelled up from London, then returned before they could be questioned(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks agrees to help old friend and partner Jimmy Valentine with an undercover drug sting, but when the bust goes wrong and a dealer ends up dead, suspicion falls on the officers. As Devlin pushes for the truth, the spotlight turns on Brooks' dark past, and a 10-year-old case involving no witnesses and a large quantity of missing heroin. Guest starring Hustle's Robert Glenister, former Rising Damp star Don Warrington and Anna Chancellor (Four Weddings and a Funeral), alongside Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Freema Agyeman(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Two children go on trial for killing a toddler, each blaming the other, and the case hinges on whether forensic evidence can prove who is guilty of strangling the boy to death. CPS director George Castle defies his superiors and takes instruction from the victim's mother, who has a surprising point of view on the crime. Drama, guest starring Deborah Findlay (Cranford), with Bill Paterson(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly is stunned when Elaine catches Vera shoplifting, and she tells Jack that she did not know what she was doing. Elsewhere, Derek is in agony(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma is aghast when Mike considers sending Mark to Eton. Liz enjoys flirting with Colin, Maureen shows an interest in Ted's old house, and Andy cooks Amy a meal(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Abandoned by his wife and faced with financial ruin, local farmer Richard Harvey finally reaches the end of his tether, and heads into Aidensfield to air his grievances in a particularly memorable way. programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a seminar in Australia and learns that she may have an inheritance claim to a piece of land there that has traditionally been used for sheep grazing. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Suzy gives Stan food from the canteen to take home - but it's stolen property. When Blakey discovers that Stan and Jack are biting the hand that feeds them, he vows to make trouble. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack feel guilty about an accident in the bus, so they volunteer to care for the Inspector's pets while he is on holiday. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby returns from a dismal holiday in Spain to find a surprise awaiting him - the love of his life, Miss Jones, is back - with a baby in tow. Comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. The twins abscond from Brockhurst College, but Pop manages to bring them back safe and sound - then lends his services to ensure the boarding school does not have to close. Meanwhile, Primrose makes an unusual request concerning affairs of the heart and Charley launches a bid to buy a local brewery. David Jason stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth sets out to solve the baffling murder of a Cambridge don who met with foul play shortly after deciding to change his will. Starring David Suchet, Beth Goddard and Mark Kingston(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy thinks he's pulled off quite a coup when he spies a dangerous armed robber, but the villain makes his escape and embarks on a desperate hunt for a fast car to steal. Meanwhile, Merton's singer-songwriter cousin arrives, looking for the peace and quiet she needs to work, but her pregnant daughter soon puts paid to that idea. Lulu guest stars(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy tells Chris she cannot wait to leave Home Farm stables, and Frank, who looks terrible after a night of drinking, gets angry with Zoe when she hides his whisky(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Carol tries to make her peace with Lorraine, Zoe and Chris worry about Frank's drinking, and Kim and Neil plan to snatch Dark Star from the stables(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim returns from Belfast and is put out as Steve is not pleased to see him back. Curly begs Reg to help him out, but Elaine's complaint has already reached Head Office(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Colin wants to be part of Liz's life, Reg warms to the idea of buying Ted's house, and Curly is interrogated by Bettabuy boss Mrs Rogers(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's secret past as a spy is revealed when a former agent is killed after a cricket match between the villagers and the gentry. The dead man's wounds appear to have been inflicted by a giant claw, triggering rumours of a 'beast of Midsomer', and before long, another body turns up with similar injuries. Barnaby then realises the incidents are linked to the time the local network of spies spent in Cold War Berlin. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with guest appearances by Anna Massey, Peter Davison and Neil Stuke(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy thinks he's pulled off quite a coup when he spies a dangerous armed robber, but the villain makes his escape and embarks on a desperate hunt for a fast car to steal. Meanwhile, Merton's singer-songwriter cousin arrives, looking for the peace and quiet she needs to work, but her pregnant daughter soon puts paid to that idea. Lulu guest stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An intense competition between two rival yacht captains ends in murder - so Jessica tries to apprehend the culprit. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the murder of a trainee forensic psychologist, whose body has been dumped in a landfill site, surroundings that make evidence of how she died impossible to detect. Vera discovers that the dead woman had been re-investigating a crime that a former prisoner had been convicted of, and must finish what she started to discover who may have wanted her dead. Guest starring Peter Davison and Paul Kaye(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is found dead in her home, Brooks and Devlin cannot be sure a crime was even committed. On further investigation, an unlikely murder weapon is uncovered and a suspect identified - a recently released serial rapist. Determined the accused is guilty, Steel pursues him with every power available - pushing the boundaries of the law to the limit. Crime drama, guest starring Kevin Doyle (Drop Dead Gorgeous), with Ben Daniels(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Three people are murdered in a shop in central London and a fourth is left for dead, and Brooks and Devlin are up against the clock to find a killer who they fear could strike again. When a suspect is brought to trial, Steel's hopes for a relatively straightforward case are dashed when he finds himself pitted against a brilliant defence lawyer. Crime drama, guest starring Rupert Graves and Amanda Root(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a well-known business tycoon leads Morse to investigate the man's feuding family, and inadvertently makes him the unwitting target of a hate campaign by the tabloids - a problem compounded by his uneasy relationship with a new chief superintendent. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star alongside Gwen Taylor, Martin Clunes, Alun Armstrong, Anna Massey, Charlotte Coleman and Rupert Graves(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An intense competition between two rival yacht captains ends in murder - so Jessica tries to apprehend the culprit. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: A flu epidemic hits the depot, improving Stan's financial health as he and Jack clock up overtime. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: The new depot nurse moves in as the Butlers' lodger - causing problems for Arthur. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney and Michael Robbins(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Miss Jones falls for new guest Hilary, a budding playwright who sends Rigsby into fits of jealousy by offering her the starring role in his latest masterpiece. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter and guest Peter Bowles(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop plans to build a swimming pool in the shape of Ma for her birthday surprise, while Charley and Mariette take a well-earned break in France. Starring David Jason and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings and the Belgian supersleuth investigate a baffling gangland murder which draws them both into the underworld of London's Little Italy. Miss Lemon turns out to have a link with the victim's valet. Whodunit, starring David Suchet and Hugh Fraser(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Local landowner Les Parnaby loses patience with ramblers wandering across his land and resolves to take matters into his own hands - regardless of the cost. Meanwhile, Ventress's car accident has a strange effect on Vernon Scripps, much to the delight of his many creditors. Rural police drama, starring Lloyd McGuire, Geoffrey Hughes and Tricia Penrose(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim cannot get the shotgun and Frank out of her mind, Zoe thinks Frank is on the verge of a breakdown, and he starts divorce proceedings against Kim(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah is pleased that Jack seems to be back to his old self, Kathy tells Zoe that she wants to take Dark Star to Kim, and Elizabeth is upset with Eric about his debt(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally wants to go on holiday, but Kevin knows he will not be able to get time off work. Ken starts giving Raquel French lessons, and Mike tells Jim he can start at MVB(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim starts at the garage, determined to make it work. Liz is embarrassed as Steve is openly rude to Colin, and Bet tackles her over the rumours about her and Colin(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer University science fellow George Jeffers threatens to make public a problem with his state-of-the-art invention Kernel Logic, which he believes is potentially lethal, but American software boss Clinton Finn fears he will lose millions if the truth comes out. When a schoolteacher is killed in a hit-and-run, Barnaby suspects Jeffers was the intended target. Detective drama, guest starring David Haig and Nigel Whitmey, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Local landowner Les Parnaby loses patience with ramblers wandering across his land and resolves to take matters into his own hands - regardless of the cost. Meanwhile, Ventress's car accident has a strange effect on Vernon Scripps, much to the delight of his many creditors. Rural police drama, starring Lloyd McGuire, Geoffrey Hughes and Tricia Penrose(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica checks into an Atlanta hotel to judge a writing contest, but a room mix-up means that instead of having short stories delivered to her door, she receives a parcel of surveillance photos. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Home Fires
programme.desc: The WI members of Great Paxford live under a shadow as the Battle of Britain looms on the horizon. Pat befriends a Czech soldier, but finds her newfound independence less enjoyable than expected. Laura faces the consequences of her affair, while Sarah receives some shocking news. Alison strikes a bargain with the police, and tragedy strikes for Frances(n)

programme.title: Home Fires
programme.desc: Laura is publicly disgraced when news of the Bowers' divorce hits the papers, with grave consequences for the surgery and her friendship with Tom. Pat is tempted by her feelings for Marek while Bob is in hospital. Steph is delighted when Stan returns home on leave, but the reunion is overshadowed by his fears of invasion. Frances discovers a secret at the reading of the will(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: As Foyle and his team search for a missing boy, their investigation leads them to a less than inviting hotel - and the discovery of the youngster's body in the nearby woods suggests one of the residents could be responsible. Milner finds his loyalty divided when Foyle is placed under house arrest, but the determined investigator vows to prove his innocence. Drama series, starring Michael Kitchen(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: After Mavis tells him he is getting fat, Derek takes up jogging. Elaine alerts Curly to the high shoplifting rate at the store, and he offends the staff by searching their bags(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alf puts an offer in on the bungalow, Jack wants to enter a talent contest at the Queens, and Derek is told to rest for a week(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The County Sheepdog Trials take place at Ashfordly Hall, and it soon becomes clear that even such a prestigious event can bring out the worst in some people. Meanwhile, Vernon tries to cash in by organising the toilet facilities for the event - but his money-making dreams soon go down the pan(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is called in to investigate the case of a deputy sheriff accused of murdering a businessman against whom he held a grudge - and soon finds there is more to it than meets the eye. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: One of Stan's colleagues is about to marry the Inspector's niece - but first he has to survive the stag night. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: The Annual Busmen's Ball arrives, and Jack arranges a stripper as part of the entertainment. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby jumps to the conclusion that Philip has bought him the kind of curvaceous Christmas cracker every man dreams of, but, as usual, his happiness is short-lived. Vintage 1975 seasonal special, starring Leonard Rossiter, Don Warrington, Richard Beckinsale and Gay Rose(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Primrose falls for a roofing contractor, while the twins prove too much of a handful for their school, prompting a trip to view the facilities on offer at Brockhurst College. Nostalgic comedy drama, starring David Jason and Pam Ferris(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A mysterious delivery causes Poirot to recall the time his supper at a Buenos Aires restaurant was rudely interrupted by the murder of a fellow diner, who unwittingly drank from a glass laced with cyanide. Drama, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Abandoned by his wife and faced with financial ruin, local farmer Richard Harvey finally reaches the end of his tether, and heads into Aidensfield to air his grievances in a particularly memorable way. Vernon and David branch out into a new line of business, and soon manage to pep up a few palates with Aunt Beth's tangy horseradish sauce(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe asks Frank to stop drinking, and when Kim confronts him at the stables, he has some horrifying news for her. Meanwhile, Lorraine moves back in with her mum(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eric's car gets repossessed, Rachel is asked to look after Robert and is aghast when he falls in the river. Joe tries to encourage Kim to go to the Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly is stunned when Elaine catches Vera shoplifting, and she tells Jack that she did not know what she was doing. Elsewhere, Derek is in agony(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma is aghast when Mike considers sending Mark to Eton. Liz enjoys flirting with Colin, Maureen shows an interest in Ted's old house, and Andy cooks Amy a meal(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A masterpiece by landscape artist Henry Hogson causes a stir when it is auctioned for £400,000 after a fierce bidding war - and hours later, its former owner is tortured and killed. When a Hogson work is then stolen, Barnaby and Jones research the Midsomer painter with the help of art teacher Matilda Simms. They soon uncover evidence of forgery - but the killer is still at large. Guest starring David Bamber and Susannah Harker, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.desc: Miss Jones falls for new guest Hilary, a budding playwright who sends Rigsby into fits of jealousy by offering her the starring role in his latest masterpiece. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter and guest Peter Bowles(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop plans to build a swimming pool in the shape of Ma for her birthday surprise, while Charley and Mariette take a well-earned break in France. Starring David Jason and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings and the Belgian supersleuth investigate a baffling gangland murder which draws them both into the underworld of London's Little Italy. Miss Lemon turns out to have a link with the victim's valet. Whodunit, starring David Suchet and Hugh Fraser(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Local landowner Les Parnaby loses patience with ramblers wandering across his land and resolves to take matters into his own hands - regardless of the cost. Meanwhile, Ventress's car accident has a strange effect on Vernon Scripps, much to the delight of his many creditors. Rural police drama, starring Lloyd McGuire, Geoffrey Hughes and Tricia Penrose(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim cannot get the shotgun and Frank out of her mind, Zoe thinks Frank is on the verge of a breakdown, and he starts divorce proceedings against Kim(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah is pleased that Jack seems to be back to his old self, Kathy tells Zoe that she wants to take Dark Star to Kim, and Elizabeth is upset with Eric about his debt(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally wants to go on holiday, but Kevin knows he will not be able to get time off work. Ken starts giving Raquel French lessons, and Mike tells Jim he can start at MVB(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim starts at the garage, determined to make it work. Liz is embarrassed as Steve is openly rude to Colin, and Bet tackles her over the rumours about her and Colin(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer University science fellow George Jeffers threatens to make public a problem with his state-of-the-art invention Kernel Logic, which he believes is potentially lethal, but American software boss Clinton Finn fears he will lose millions if the truth comes out. When a schoolteacher is killed in a hit-and-run, Barnaby suspects Jeffers was the intended target. Detective drama, guest starring David Haig and Nigel Whitmey, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Local landowner Les Parnaby loses patience with ramblers wandering across his land and resolves to take matters into his own hands - regardless of the cost. Meanwhile, Ventress's car accident has a strange effect on Vernon Scripps, much to the delight of his many creditors. Rural police drama, starring Lloyd McGuire, Geoffrey Hughes and Tricia Penrose(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica checks into an Atlanta hotel to judge a writing contest, but a room mix-up means that instead of having short stories delivered to her door, she receives a parcel of surveillance photos. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Home Fires
programme.desc: The WI members of Great Paxford live under a shadow as the Battle of Britain looms on the horizon. Pat befriends a Czech soldier, but finds her newfound independence less enjoyable than expected. Laura faces the consequences of her affair, while Sarah receives some shocking news. Alison strikes a bargain with the police, and tragedy strikes for Frances(n)

programme.title: Home Fires
programme.desc: Laura is publicly disgraced when news of the Bowers' divorce hits the papers, with grave consequences for the surgery and her friendship with Tom. Pat is tempted by her feelings for Marek while Bob is in hospital. Steph is delighted when Stan returns home on leave, but the reunion is overshadowed by his fears of invasion. Frances discovers a secret at the reading of the will(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: As Foyle and his team search for a missing boy, their investigation leads them to a less than inviting hotel - and the discovery of the youngster's body in the nearby woods suggests one of the residents could be responsible. Milner finds his loyalty divided when Foyle is placed under house arrest, but the determined investigator vows to prove his innocence. Drama series, starring Michael Kitchen(n)

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Moira Lister guests as a film star admitted to the hospital - an event that inspires much rivalry between Archie and Norman(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar visits Venice to save a damsel in distress - only to find himself plunged headlong into a seedy underworld of gangsters, intrigue and deadly revenge. Roger Moore plays the suave secret agent, with William Sylvester, Patrick Troughton and Lois Maxwell(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A murderer plays twisted mind games on the emotionally fragile woman who saw him disposing of the body, in the hope of driving her to suicide. Guest starring William Katt (Carrie)(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A hostage is shot during an attempted armed robbery at a bank - and Quincy gets the job of defending the policeman who pulled the trigger(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur and Terry rescue Greek-Cypriot Charlie from a beating and learn that his cousin is being threatened by another relative who wants to take over their restaurant. Encouraged by Charlie who is vowing revenge, Terry takes a job in the establishment to try to catch the tormentors red-handed(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's sanity is questioned when he becomes preoccupied with a gang of Hell's Angels and puts his life in jeopardy by taking part in a motorbike race to the death. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is called in to help a Russian physicist who wants to defect to America. Vintage adventure, starring Roger Moore, with Guy Deghy, Anthony Booth and Yootha Joyce(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A detective with a drink problem is demoted to a beat cop, but his determination to make amends for his past mistakes leads him to get in the way of Theo's murder investigation(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A police officer is killed while listening in on a deal between the Yakuza and the Mafia. Quincy's sidekick Sam investigates, but finds himself getting deeper into trouble himself(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Bearer bonds go missing from gangster Bobby Altman, and suspect Billy Gilpin appears at Arthur's house wanting to get out of town. Terry drives him to a hotel, but when Altman finds out he believes Arthur is involved and tries to establish the truth. George Baker and Roy Kinnear guest star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An amnesiac woman delivers a garbled message about an attack on a diplomatic meeting planned for the following day. She later regains her memory and tells Bodie and Doyle her employers were abducted by the same gunmen who intend to carry out the action. Gordon Jackson, Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A member of a group of convicts slips off the roof and dies during a robbery. The apparent leader of the gang appears to be having doubts about his life and Regan senses he is deliberately pointing clues in a desire to be caught during his next job. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Rugby World Cup's Greatest Tries
programme.desc: Martin Bayield takes a look back at some of the tournament's most memorable tries, including New Zealander John Kirwan's effort against Italy in the first-ever World Cup match back in 1987, his compatriot Jonah Lomu terrorising England in 1995, and Jason Robinson's try for the English to help them defeat Australia in the 2003 final(n)

programme.title: Lethal Weapon (1987)
programme.desc: An unstable Vietnam veteran cop teams up with a by-the-book Los Angeles police detective to investigate the apparent suicide of the daughter of a wealthy businessman, leading them to a violent and bloody confrontation with a ruthless drug cartel under the control of a retired US general. Action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Gary Busey, Mitchell Ryan and Tom Atkins(n)

programme.desc: When a conman and his girlfriend trick a prominent scientist with a tale about hidden treasure, he is taken hostage in Hamburg and sold to the Russians. Templar is 'lured' along similar lines and the confidence trick enables the spy to find the missing man. Roger Moore stars(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: One of Theo's colleagues discovers that an old school friend is involved with fencing the loot from a diamond heist, and decides to exploit his friendship to bring the crooks down(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A friend of Quincy's is suspected of arson and murder following an attack on a furniture warehouse, and the trial leads to friction between the coroner and the Federal Grand Jury(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A professional gambler needs to hide a group of people who might be able to help him win at roulette, so Arthur hits on the idea of using Terry's flat. Comedy drama, guest starring Anthony Valentine and featuring a pre-Birds of a Feather Lesley Joseph(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's schoolteacher girlfriend seeks CI5's assistance to quash a drug-smuggling ring after learning a 14-year-old pupil is involved having used then hidden a discarded firearm. The body count soon increases at an alarming rate as potential witnesses to a crime are killed off by the ruthless gang. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Celia Gregory star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A former criminal and friend of Regan's wins a large amount of money on the pools - but then receives blackmailing phone calls regarding a crime from 11 years earlier for which he was never caught. But then she was brutally attacked, with her abuser punching her and stamping on her head with reinforced boots. At first, Kelly denied her husband's behaviour to the police. Meanwhile, Rory is dispatched to rescue a Sprinter that is blocking a bus lane, and Jim has to work fast to get a stranded HGV driver to safety(n)

programme.title: The Great Model Railway Challenge
programme.desc: Three teams of modellers are given three days to create masterpieces based on the theme of best-selling book. The Seven Pillars of Wisdom by TE Lawrence (aka Lawrence of Arabia) is the inspiration for the Scarborough Flyers, sci-fi fans the Rail Riders choose HG Wells' classic War of the Worlds as their muse, while Team Phoenix's layout is inspired by various tomes by the queen of crime, Agatha Christie. As usual presenters James Richardson and Tim Shaw are joined by expert judges Kathy Millat and Steve Flint(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Flight
programme.desc: Documentary examining the royal family's history with air travel, from the first King's Flight in 1936 to the modern-day journeys undertaken by Queen Elizabeth II. Cameras step inside the private world of regal life in the air, uncovering the mysterious traditions and protocols behind royal travel, from the story of the Queen's Commonwealth tour in 1953 to the unique challenges presented in more recent times(n)

programme.title: Celebs Go Motorhoming: Back on the Road
programme.desc: Leaving Loch Lomond and the midges behind, Lesley Joseph, Don Warrington, Melvyn Hayes, Nick Heyward and Cleo Rocos travel over the sea to Skye via the Glenfinnan Viaduct, a structure made famous by the Harry Potter films. Once on the isle, they are told a tall tale by a kilted Scotsman, almost get blown off the Quiraing and walk in the footsteps of dinosaurs. The excitement isn't over, as they get to sample scallops straight from the sea. Finally the five all get down to a traditional Scottish ceilidh, which they discover is a lot easier to do than to spell(n)

programme.title: The Real Patrick Swayze: In His Own Words
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze had everything, from good looks and hit films to a stable and loving relationship. But he spent a lifetime battling the feeling that he wasn't good enough. A decade after his death, this is the inside story of his struggle for acceptance, by others and by himself(n)

programme.title: Sorry, Wrong Number (1948)
programme.desc: Rich, neurotic Leona Stevenson lies bedridden at home and is trying to phone her husband. But the lines are crossed, and she accidentally overhears a call in which two men are planning a murder. She frantically tries to raise the alarm, and when at last she manages to convince the telephone company of her story, she comes to realise with increasing horror who their intended victim is. Thriller, starring Barbara Stanwyck, Burt Lancaster, Ann Richards and Wendell Corey(n)

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff! (1969)
programme.desc: A drifter in need of money takes the job of sheriff in a small mining outpost, and chooses the town drunk to be his deputy. Events take a chaotic turn when a family of influential crooks decides to pull out all the stops to do away with the lawman. Comedy Western, starring James Garner, Joan Hackett, Jack Elam, Bruce Dern and Walter Brennan(n)

programme.title: Sea of Sand (1958)
programme.desc: Allied troops fighting in North Africa in 1943 are redeployed as saboteurs behind enemy lines to blow up Rommel's desert fuel dumps. A clash of personalities between officers initially causes problems, but the men overcome their differences to work together. Second World War adventure, starring Richard Attenborough, John Gregson, Michael Craig and Vincent Ball(n)

programme.title: The Colditz Story (1954)
programme.desc: A medieval castle in Germany is turned into a PoW camp during the Second World War, and used to house the most rebellious Allied prisoners, all of whom have made repeated escape attempts. Although breaking out is supposedly impossible, the determined inmates refuse to be beaten and continue their bid for freedom. Second World War drama, starring John Mills and Eric Portman(n)

programme.title: Tomorrow, When the War Began (2010)
programme.desc: Seven Australian teenagers return from a camping trip in the wilderness to find that while away, their country has been invaded by a hostile foreign power and their families sent to prison camps. They form a resistance group to fight a guerrilla campaign against the occupying forces. Action adventure, starring Caitlin Stasey, Rachel Hurd-Wood and Lincoln Lewis(n)

programme.title: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates (2016)
programme.desc: Two hard-partying brothers place an online adverisement to find the perfect dates for their sister's Hawaiian wedding. Hoping for a wild getaway, the boys instead find themselves out-hustled by an uncontrollable duo and calamity ensues. Comedy, starring Zac Efron, Anna Kendrick and Adam Devine(n)

programme.title: Ted 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The foul-mouthed talking teddy bear is horrified to discover that he counts as property according to the law. He and his human best friend hire a pot-smoking lawyer to help them fight a court case and get Ted legally recognised as a person. Comedy sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg and Amanda Seyfried, with the voice of Seth MacFarlane(n)

programme.title: R.I.P.D. (2013)
programme.desc: A cop is murdered in the line of duty by his crooked partner, and ends up recruited by a supernatural police force. Teaming up with a Wild West lawman, he is sent back to Earth to prevent ghosts from causing chaos and uncovers a plot to overrun the land of the living with evil spirits. Fantasy adventure, with Ryan Reynolds and Jeff Bridges(n)

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles (1959)
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson are asked to protect the last remaining member of the aristocratic Baskerville family, who is believed to be the target of a monstrous spectral hound roaming the remote Devon moors. Hammer version of Arthur Conan Doyle's mystery, starring Peter Cushing, Andre Morrell, Christopher Lee, John Le Mesurier and Miles Malleson(n)

programme.title: The Turning Point (1952)
programme.desc: A journalist helps a crusading district attorney who has been given the task of cracking down on a crime syndicate, but the pair's efforts are hampered by political corruption. Film noir, starring William Holden, Edmond O'Brien and Alexis Smith(n)

programme.title: The 300 Spartans (1962)
programme.desc: The ruler of the Persian empire vows to expand his realm by conquering Greece. The king of Sparta steps forward to defend his homeland and the other kingdoms of Greece, but when he is betrayed by a political council, he finds himself without an army and must fend off the vast invading army with a mere 300 warriors. Historical drama, starring Richard Egan, Ralph Richardson and Diane Baker(n)

programme.title: Rawhide (1951)
programme.desc: Outlaws hold staff and a passenger and her baby hostage at a remote stagecoach station while awaiting the arrival of a shipment of $100,000 in gold bullion. The nervous captives try to stay calm, but the tension between the gang leader and a jumpy henchman grows fraught, ending in a frantic shoot-out - with the infant in the thick of the fray. Western, starring Tyrone Power, Susan Hayward and Jack Elam(n)

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: An explorer stumbles upon evidence that an American Civil War battleship, which was laden with treasure when it sank without trace, has ended up somewhere in the Sahara. However, he is deflected from his mercenary quest to find the hoard by an encounter with a tenacious doctor, whose battle to stop the spread of a deadly disease could be linked to his own mission. Adventure, starring Matthew McConaughey, Penelope Cruz and Steve Zahn(n)

programme.title: Prospect (2018)
programme.desc: A teenager and her father travel to a remote alien moon aiming to strike it rich, but there are others roving the wilderness and the job quickly devolves into a fight to survive. Sci-fi thriller, starring Sophie Thatcher, Jay Duplass and Pedro Pascal(n)

programme.title: Prometheus (2012)
programme.desc: A spacecraft is sent to another world, following clues left in ancient artefacts, in search of aliens that may have created the human race. However, the explorers on board discover the extraterrestrials may not be the benevolent creatures they imagined, while the company funding the expedition has its own agenda. Ridley Scott's sci-fi thriller and Alien prequel, starring Noomi Rapace, Michael Fassbender, Charlize Theron and Idris Elba(n)

programme.title: Veteran (2015)
programme.desc: Experienced and pragmatic Seoul detective Seo Do-cheol visits the Sun-jinn corporation's headquarters to investigate the suicide of his friend Bae, who supposedly killed himself after protesting against being sacked from his job for joining a union. The detective grows suspicious and soon finds himself pitted against the heir to the business and his henchmen. Comedy crime drama, starring Jung-min Hwang. In Korean(n)

programme.title: 12 Angry Men (1957)
programme.desc: Twelve jurors convene to decide the verdict in a murder trial. While 11 of the group are thoroughly convinced the teenage defendant is guilty, one lone voice of reason refuses to cave in to pressure and passionately argues the case for his innocence. Sidney Lumet's legal drama, starring Henry Fonda, Lee J Cobb, Ed Begley, Martin Balsam and Jack Klugman(n)

programme.title: The Great Sioux Uprising (1953)

Leonard and Penny attend the funeral, where they talk about their rejected marriage proposals, but Sheldon has difficulty dealing with the death of his childhood hero - until a surprise visitor helps him cope with his grief. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with a guest appearance by Bob Newhart(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets fired from the movie, prompting her to take a serious look at her life. Raj receives advice from Sheldon after he sees Emily on a date with another man at the cinema, while Howard's mother breaks her leg. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox is annoyed when Zander decides to move in with two female students at college. Meanwhile, Joe goes against Mel's wishes and agrees to act as a wingman to his recently divorced friend Charlie on a night out. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel's father comes to town to help her announce her candidacy for state senate, but jeopardises his daughter's chances when he sends a racy photo to everyone involved in her campaign after Joe teaches him about selfies. Meanwhile, Ryder tries to find a winning idea for his entrepreneur's club project. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben, Riley, Danny and Tucker wonder where their own lives are heading when Bonnie delegates a very important job to them. Riley feels conflicted about her relationships with Ben and Danny, and Bonnie makes a decision that leaves everyone feeling frustrated(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie promotes Riley to chief bridesmaid and demands a crazy hen party, while Brad asks Danny to be his best man and throw an epic stag do. Tucker tells everyone he's going to a television convention in Detroit, but he's actually making his annual trek to Las Vegas, where he spends one weekend a year living his dream of being a lounge singer. Dan Castellaneta guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After identifying the mob informant, Holt, Jake and Rosa make plans to infiltrate FBI headquarters to get the man's files, with the captain bringing in his former partner to help out. Guest starring Dennis Haysbert (24's President Palmer)(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Officers at the precinct drop everything to intervene when they suspect that Captain Holt is in danger after their efforts to track down Adrian Pimento's hitman take an unexpected turn. Dennis Haysbert guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly reignites a long-standing feud after she invites Murray's unreliable brother to visit at Thanksgiving. Meanwhile, Adam upsets the balance of power between him and Barry after he wins a ball game between them for the first time. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica's new job at the department store is put in jeopardy when Beverly takes advantage of her daughter's employee discount too frequently. Meanwhile, during a trip to the horse racing track, Pops bends the truth to convince Barry that his bad luck has changed for the better. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang re-creates a prom night on the roof of the apartment building when the girls decide they would like to re-enact their evenings with their current partners. However, Sheldon feels under pressure to take part in all the romantic traditions, and Howard worries about who Stuart will bring as his date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon panics when Leonard announces he has to go into hospital for surgery, and the impending divorce of Raj's parents motivates Howard and Bernadette to work on their own marriage. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: The Good Place
programme.desc: An ordinary woman is sent to a pleasant afterlife where she definitely doesn't belong. Eleanor's eagerness to learn ethics from Chidi turns the task of teaching her into a full-time job he never wanted. Meanwhile, Michael and Janet focus their attention on a neighbourhood emergency(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is upset when a magazine fails to mention him in an article about the paper he co-wrote with Sheldon. Meanwhile, a power cut at Mrs Wolowitz's home leads to a final family dinner in her honour. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Leonard and Sheldon are invited to speak at UC Berkeley, they decide to take a detour and try to meet one of their idols - Star Wars director George Lucas. Meanwhile, Raj and Amy offer to settle a dispute with a game of table tennis. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick helps Jerry out with the family dog Snuffles by creating a device to make him more intelligent, but things go awry. Rick and Morty also invade the dreams of Morty's maths teacher Mr Goldenfold in an effort to raise Morty's grades. Rob Paulsen and Jess Harnell guest star(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Bev Cameron has multiple sclerosis and finds that a warm climate helps her manage her symptoms. As a response, she has decided to buy a property near the historic harbour town of Paphos, in Cyprus. Enlisting the help of Bev's best friend Shelley, Laura Hamilton delivers five potential homes for her budget of £90,000, in the hopes that one of them will fit the bill(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Reality TV star and choreographer Louie Spence and his husband Leto Fernandez have long-dreamed of owning a holiday home in Spain's Almeria Province - somewhere to spend the winter months and short summer breaks with friends and family. Laura Hamilton is on hand to show them five properties within their £185,000 budget, but will any of them have Louie high-kicking with delight?(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Bradford, West Yorkshire, Michelle is tired of the abode she shares with Andrew. The bungalow, set in rolling hills, is small and was only supposed to be a temporary home - that was a decade ago. However, Andrew loves this place. Kirstie tries to convince Michelle to stay by solving her kitchen problem and adding some feminine touches to the decor. Phil, meanwhile, has found a selection of amazing properties to buy - including a bungalow that's twice the size and a barn conversion with lots of outside space(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree continue their renovation of a French chateau, 18 months after the end of the first series. So far, only nine rooms have been renovated and many areas of the 12-acre estate have yet to be looked at - but the project is going to have to start paying for itself soon. They make plans to host weddings on the grounds, while looking ahead to keeping livestock and growing their own crops. Dick takes steps to generate solar power during a hot summer, and turns an old oil tank into a pig roaster(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of a week of dinner parties in Devon is hosted by community nurse Tina, who hopes to impress her guests with a menu incorporating all of her favourite dishes(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Devon, Essex contestant Rob is pinning his hopes on an Italian-themed menu - and some artful entertainment - to land him the £1,000 prize money(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pilot Rhys hosts the latest dinner party in Devon, but one of the guests is thrown out of an imaginary lifeboat and an interesting find leads to Rhys being mistaken for a stripper(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: HR manager Holly serves up restaurant favourites in Devon, but her guests are put out when she sets rules over the use of the toilet - and a portrait leaves the men open-mouthed(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Devon, detective Steve is counting on a menu of bold and experimental flavours to win him the £1,000 prize. His feast of bold flavours goes down a storm with most of the guests, but also sparks a Pavlova row between Tina and Holly(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The presenter attempts to unlock the potential of old houses, including the rules when it comes to putting a kitchen in a period home. He also meets a woman who bought a 400-year-old Devon cottage, and has some solutions for turning this old house into a new home(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, keepers prepare for the difficult task of transporting giraffe Kidepo to a new zoo, and Kidepo's brother Narus is not making the move any easier. Meanwhile, silvery gibbon Alvin is keen to get close to his partner Tilu again, and after diving headfirst into an empty pool one too many times, keepers decide a trip to the vet is in order for caiman lizard Gary to see if there is an underlying problem. Elsewhere, dominant warthog Magnum is being challenged by fellow warthog Dobby, so keepers decide it is time to move Dobby to a zoo in Germany(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Russian blue cat is brought into the surgery with a shattered jaw after a dog attack, and a man living in a homeless shelter brings in his best friend Spud, a Labrador cross with a lame back leg. Plus, Noel tries to help straighten a deformity in a six-month-old Chihuahua puppy's leg(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Gallery owner Elinor and fitness entrepreneur Born set themselves the task of creating Britain's first hypoallergenic house in a leafy back garden plot in south west London. Driven by the need to alleviate their two young sons' life-threatening allergies, their new part-submerged, shed-inspired home, will be constructed using low toxin materials and deploy cutting-edge filtration systems to clean the air they breathe. Will their innovative new house deliver the benefits Elinor and Born are hoping for?(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Margreeth concentrate on renovating the only caravan in their new park and the fire pit that will be its centrepiece. Nicole and Stephan make a drastic decision, and prepare for a party to celebrate the renovation of the main hall. Paul and Alison continue their search for the secret tunnel in their oubliette, and make the final preparations for a wedding, but bad weather throws both tasks into disarray(n)

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire washes up on a seemingly deserted island, while navigating treacherous waters has crippled the Artemis, so Jamie devises a joyful moment for his crew(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A young man who has had a severe reaction to a recreational drug is wheeled into resus by paramedics, and senior sister Jen and the medical team face a challenge to calm their patient down so they can treat him. A 65-year-old woman is brought in by her best friends after hitting her head when she fell off a chair while playing bingo, and a 31-year-old man with multiple sclerosis is rushed in after developing a fever at home(n)

Matt Tebbutt investigates the possible health risks caused by his habit of going back for a second dip in a communal salsa with a tortilla chip that's already been in his mouth(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Anne Hunt from Cheshire has recently retired and has long dreamed of buying a property in Spain where she can spend her new-found free time relaxing in the sun. With her best friend Sharon along to help her with the decision, Danni Menzies shows her five properties on the southern Costa Blanca for her £50,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Guy and Julie Sadler from Brighton have travelled all around the world together and have long dreamed of relocating somewhere warm. Now, although they've never been to Spain, they've decided that Almería has the perfect balance of sunshine and affordable property. Laura Hamilton shows them five homes for their £100,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer come to the aid of the Oberoi family from Harrow, whose house has a fridge freezer and in the hallway and a single room for their two children. Kirstie comes up with a plan to expand the kitchen and make the lounge more welcoming, while Phil shows them some of the other homes on the market(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Fresh from the success of hosting a three-day wedding at the chateau, Dick and Angel make business plans for the grounds, intending to charge people to fish in the moat and forage in the woods. Angel starts work on a second guest suite, but also wants to install an elevator, which pushes Dick's engineering skills to the limit(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Kevin hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in and around Swansea, hoping to win his guests over with an evening inspired by his favourite holiday destination of Benidorm(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This week's competition is in and around Swansea, where second host, café bar owner Tino, is hoping to wow her guests with an African banquet inspired by her homeland of Zimbabwe(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week in Swansea, beautician Natalie hopes to impress her guests with a George Michael-themed evening(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Rob hopes his Thai-themed menu will impress the guests in Swansea, but his starter lacks a vital component and his main is incredibly similar to the previous course(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, GP and keen tennis player Janine hopes to serve up an ace with a tennis-themed evening. The night kicks off with everyone dressed up for Centre Court - and bodybuilder Rob turning up in a mini skirt. Benidorm-loving DJ Kev is overcome with emotion as he tells the gang that this is the best week of his life, while cafe bar owner Tino decides to pick fault with Janine's dishes instead(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits a Grade-II listed worker's cottage in Hampshire, as his mission to future-proof historic houses continues. Due to restrictions on planning permissions, the property has become somewhat disorganised, and is in need of a careful makeover. Seeking inspiration, George tours a Victorian stable that was renovated to add a gym, cinema and roof garden, and heads to a farmhouse in East Sussex to view a smart and stylish solution to the problem of designing new, accessible bathrooms for period properties(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Thirty seven-year-old elephant Thi is pregnant for the ninth time but the keepers believe she is now three months' overdue. The risks for Thi and her unborn calf are growing by the day, and the staff are worried. Rampant male Rothschild giraffe Meru causes problems for the giraffe herd as he relentlessly chases the females, and male clownfish Polo gets injured while fighting with the other males for the attentions of dominant female Rosie. However, clownfish can change sex at will, and Polo's time alone in an isolation tank produces a surprising side effect(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Senior neurologist Dr Colin Driver comes up with an unconventional solution to treat a nurse's cat, which has been rushed into the surgery after being poisoned. The owners of a rare Polish sheepdog with a failed fracture repair on a broken leg are faced with the option of having the leg removed, or trying an innovative total elbow replacement. Plus, a self-confessed 'crazy cat lady' brings in a ginger tom which urgently needs leg surgery(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Steph and her husband Alex build a contemporary, cantilevered farmhouse on farmlands once owned by her grandfather in Herefordshire. Steph and Alex are told their ambitious design will cost £500,000, twice as much as they can borrow, but the pair decide to take a leap of faith and move into a draughty old caravan on site as they begin working on their new home(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to plant a romantic rose garden for her singles weekend, but she cannot operate the digger. Dick and Angel need to rescue a children's trampoline from their moat(n)

programme.title: 24 Hour Baby Hospital
programme.desc: After early pregnancy concerns, mother-of-nine Rosemary checks in hoping for the safe delivery of her 10th child. Mater Hospital nurse Aoife gets used to being a patient for the first time in her life while awaiting her first child(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary following the emergency services in Wiltshire. This edition focuses on the high numbers of crimes of a sexual nature involving women being targeted by predatory males as the county's force receives three times as many reports of voyeurism and men exposing themselves than any other in the UK(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Schizophrenic Graham, 75, is brought to King's College Hospital after being stabbed in the neck by a stranger on his doorstep, and needs a CT scan to reveal the extent of his wound. Former nursery nurse Pat, 89, also arrives on the ward, having been found at the bottom of the stairs at home with no recollection of how she got there, while palliative care nurse Tracey treats 72-year-old retired postman Michael, who was recently diagnosed with lung cancer(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

Plus, a self-confessed 'crazy cat lady' brings in a ginger tom which urgently needs leg surgery(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt visits China to find out how they maximise the chances of finding pearls, and helps to cultivate them from a surprising creature that is definitely not an oyster! Meanwhile, Kate Quilton investigates whether it is safe to eat sliced ham that has developed a weird rainbow pattern, and discovers a bizarre connection between the meat and butterflies(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Bonnie Motley from Hertfordshire is looking to improve her quality of life, and is convinced buying a holiday home in the guaranteed sunshine of southern Spain is just the way to do that. With friend of 30 years Jonathan along to help her with the decision, Ben Hillman shows Bonnie five properties within her £20,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Musical couple Paul and Judith Corazzo from Dorset have been dreaming of buying a holiday home in sunny Spain, where they can escape from their hectic work lives back in the UK. For their budget of £140,000, Jasmine Harman shows them five properties to consider(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Brixworth, Northamptonshire, rugby fan Ian wants to leave the property that he and wife Sarah bought together two years ago. With a toddler and a couple of dogs, their two-bed rural semi is bursting at the seams. However, Sarah believes the house has the potential to cater for a growing family and wants to stay - if they can sort out their dingy ground floor. Kirstie wants to open up the downstairs and drive a digger through the conservatory, but will Ian and Sarah like the idea?(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

It's an unusual evening complete with strange food, shocking name reveals and dessert taking an unexpected turn(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mobile hairdresser and amateur musical songstress Debbie hosts the third dinner party in and around Newcastle, hoping to inject a little showbiz sparkle to her night(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Debs, again, struggles with the menu but also lets out her personal feelings about the group. Art teacher Karen gets it in the neck for ruining other people's nights, Mark is accused of being boring, and David settles for bringing a very weird noise to the table(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The host visits Ben at his ground floor apartment in St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex. George's challenge is to turn a grand drawing room with sea views into a cool, elegant kitchen-diner and create rich, opulent schemes for a bedroom and study. In Manchester, he tackles a 1930s semi-detached where the compact dimensions are proving a headache. With only a tiny budget to work with, can he make a cramped galley kitchen both functional and beautiful?(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chimp Zee Zee gives birth to a daughter and keepers hope her arrival will have a calming influence on the others. Meanwhile, chameleon Mr Parsons is set up with a young female, banteng mother Naya struggles to bond with her newly born calf, and elephant Nadita should be looking after baby Anjan, but would rather play with her boisterous cousin, Aayu(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Staffordshire bull terrier requires attention when it suffers complete paralysis in its back legs, and a Devon rex cat is brought in after being struck by a car. Its eight-year-old owner faces a tough decision when X-rays reveal a severely broken pelvis and a ruptured bladder. Plus, a young cavalier king has had seven operations in a bid to fix its knee joint, and Noel tries to resolve the problem(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Identical twins Nik and Jon Daughtry build two near-identical houses next door to each other in Sheffield, paying tribute to the city's industrial past. Their plans are incredibly ambitious, not only do they want to build the two houses for the price of one, but the materials and finish have to be absolutely perfect. With a tight budget, it's an almighty stretch from the start. As delays, overages and imperfections hit, it's clear the twins' intuitive and incredibly close relationship will be tested like never before(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Margreeth start to research their new business idea, but can they find the suppliers to help them? Stephanie's big event - her singles night - arrives, while Sophie and James put on a walking tour near their chateau(n)

programme.title: Thou Shalt Not Kill
programme.desc: The body of Gloria Severini is found on the floor of her living room by the cleaning lady. When Valeria arrives at the crime scene, the woman's 20-year-old son - who has a reputation for being hot-headed - cannot be found, prompting suspicion that he may have been involved in his mother's demise. Detective drama, starring Miriam Leone. In Italian(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: On a busy Saturday night at King's College Hospital, staff have to juggle the needs of elderly patients and sick children alongside those who are drunk or violent. programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie sort through a property full of rusty relics and attend a lumberjack contest(n)

James also takes the 950bhp LaFerrari hybrid hypercar out for a spin in Italy, and singer Olly Murs is the Star in the Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of police officers through body-worn cameras(n)

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop

programme.desc: Joel builds a home he has never seen before using a crane he hopes he will never see again. Peter and Beat attempt to build the fastest troll on skis(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May take a look at increasingly popular tall hatchbacks known as crossovers. Having concluded their primary appeal is to caravanners, the duo spend a couple of days in models by Mazda and Volkswagen and try to get a feel for what life is like for the people they believe would buy one. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond drives a pair of exciting Lamborghinis in Italy - the ferocious Aventador Roadster and the limited-edition Sesto Elemento, which carries an eye-watering price tag of around £2million. Two cars are also put through their paces on the test track, with James in a modern re-creation of the classic Porsche 911 and Aerosmith frontman Steven Tyler in the rather less exotic Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team embark on their 200th dig, examining the bed of a reservoir in a valley high up on Dartmoor in Devon. The specially drained site presents difficulties with its abundance of thick mud, but the archaeological experts uncover a network of monuments that suggests the existence of a major prehistoric site. Their efforts are further rewarded with the discovery of the first stone henge in Britain for a century(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the archaeologists excavate a site in Leicestershire, which they believe contains an Anglo-Saxon burial ground. Though their initial search for a cemetery proves fruitless, more digging leads to the experts uncovering evidence of several types of funeral, as well as a highly valuable piece of jewellery - and one member of the team volunteers to take part in a re-creation of a cremation ceremony from the period(n)

programme.title: War Factories

programme.desc: The archaeologists get an opportunity to dig at an army firing range in High Ham, Somerset, to investigate a set of Roman mosaics first discovered 150 years ago. Presented by Tony Robinson(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson gets to choose a site for investigation and decides to take the team to Jersey, where a German anti-aircraft battery was built during the Second World War. programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Egg
programme.desc: David Attenborough returns to Madagascar to see how the island has changed in the 50 years since his first visit, and to search for more clues about one of his most treasured possessions, the egg of an elephant bird, an ostrich-like creature that weighed half a ton. programme.desc: Documentary following battle re-enactors, whose hobby brings to life famous conflicts from throughout history. The programme begins with a group of English Civil War enthusiasts, who recreate The Siege of Marlborough, where the Royalists took control of the town in 1642(n)

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Past
programme.desc: The documentary investigating the stories of explorers who put everything on the line to find sought-after objects returns, beginning with a look at American lawyer John Lloyd Stephens and British artist Frederick Catherwood - the men who found the Maya civilization(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team travel to Derwentcote in Co Durham, where they explore the Industrial Revolution's impact on the region by digging through the undergrowth to search for old furnaces and forges. Their investigation is also helped by the diary of an 18th-century industrial spy, and records from the time help shed light on how the area's cottage industries gave way to the power of expanding cities such as Sheffield(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team search for Roman artefacts beneath the graveyard of St Kyneburgha's Church in Castor, Cambridgeshire. With several reports of similar finds in and around the village, speculation mounts that they could uncover the remnants of a praetorium - a huge building that would have dominated the region's skyline during the period. However, as the experts start digging in other nearby locations, they discover that not all the evidence points to the same conclusion(n)

programme.title: Life in the Air
programme.desc: The final episode of the series features footage shot from within a giant flock of birds, revealing how half a million of them can fly in a group without colliding with each other. The programme also showcases the world's fastest airborne courtship display, a bird that savagely defends its territory, and conflict between moths and bats in the South American jungle(n)

programme.title: Attenborough's Birds of Paradise
programme.desc: Among David Attenborough's life-long passions are birds of paradise, which he has tracked all over the jungles of New Guinea to film their beautiful and often bizarre displays. In this documentary, he examines how and why these creatures have captivated explorers, naturalists, artists, film-makers and even royalty, investigating the myths surrounding their discovery 500 years ago, the latest extraordinary behaviour captured on camera and the science behind their beauty. He also travels to a state-of-the art facility in Qatar that houses the largest breeding group of these birds in the world(n)

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: Will and Carlton get involved in a legal battle with Philip when they refuse to pay their rent until the air conditioning is fixed. American comedy, starring Will Smith and James Avery(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: The family attends a seance to contact Hilary's ex-fiance, but Will's scepticism causes friction and leads to all sorts of bad luck. American comedy, starring Will Smith, James Avery and Karyn Parsons(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Part one of two. Alan makes a bid to rekindle his relationship with Judith, while Herb tries to adopt Charlie's bachelor lifestyle. Guest starring Ryan Stiles(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie's girlfriend Chelsea asks him to spend the night at her place, while Alan tries to enforce a punishment on Jake. Jennifer Taylor guest stars(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Harlow reveals the truth about her mother, who is ordered by a mysterious man (Good Morning Britain's Richard Arnold) to have nothing more to do with her(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: After a stressed-out Raffy flunks an exam, Justin starts researching the process of making cannabis oil. Robbo finally learns who is after him and what they want(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Letting agent Paul is called to a houseshare after fighting, cannabis use and partying drive one resident out of the property establishes the source of the problem is a young couple. Harrow housing agents Andrew and Jo find a suspected unlicensed multiple-occupancy house in gross disrepair. After tracking down the landlord, they have mercy and allow him to spend his £5,000 fine on fixing up the property, in the hope he will turn it into a nice family home. But will the he be as good as his word?(n)

programme.title: Inside Coca Cola
programme.desc: Documentary revealing how a murky brown medicine invented in 1886, containing cocaine, became the best-selling soft drink of all time. Cameras are allowed access to the company's gigantic bottling factory in Wakefield. There's also a look through the archive library at Coca-Cola's Atlanta HQ and an interview with the actor who played the Diet Coke hunk in the famous TV advert campaign, discovering his his life was changed for ever(n)

programme.title: Parker (2013)
programme.desc: A thief is betrayed and left for dead by his partners in crime. He learns they are planning a diamond heist in a wealthy neighbourhood, so poses as a millionaire wanting to buy a house in the area. A real-estate agent sees through the disguise and helps him get even by stealing the gems from his traitorous gang. Action thriller, with Jason Statham and Jennifer Lopez(n)
