programme.title: Catch a Contractor
programme.desc: The team hunts for unreliable contractor Avi, who was hired to fix a burst sewer pipe but left the job unfinished. Rendered physically sick by the ensuing insect infestation, the homeowners require Adam and Skip to track the man down and force him to address the debacle he created(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Delko returns to help the team crack the case of a diamond robbery that ended in the murder of a bystander, and everyone is happy to have him back - except Natalia, who is suspicious of his motives. As investigations proceed, a theft from the crime lab complicates matters. Starring David Caruso and Adam Rodriguez(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team responds to an emergency call from a luxury penthouse, and arrives to find a mummified corpse in the living room. Learning there could be further victims trapped in the apartment, Mac and Stella try to unravel a series of riddles in the booby-trapped 'death house'. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: The Detail
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when a burned corpse is found, and their only leads are a dog collar found round his neck and the fact he had a limp. Drama, starring Angela Griffin(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The detective investigates the disappearance of a fertility doctor with connections to horse racing, and questions a jockey, a nurse and an irate patient in a bid to get to the bottom of the case. Comedy drama, starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant student is found murdered, and detectives Briscoe and Curtis discover she was strangled to death before being stabbed by the killer in an effort to make the attack seem like the random act of a psychopath. A mathematics professor soon comes under suspicion as eyewitnesses allege he was close to the crime scene on the night in question(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part one of two. A shootout between a motorist and the police leads to the discovery of a body in a car boot - and puts the detectives on the trail of a money-laundering operation run by Russian gangsters. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part pilot episode, in which Jessica Fletcher continues her investigation into the mystery surrounding the death of a party guest dressed as Sherlock Holmes, found floating in her publisher's swimming pool. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica takes her great-nephew and niece on a day trip and is asked to investigate the murder of an amusement park owner. Crime drama, starring Angela Lansbury, alongside Joaquin Phoenix and his sister Summer(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the backstage murder of a dancer while attending a special presentation of the Rostov Ballet. Angela Lansbury stars as the amateur sleuth, with Tom Bosley(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Green and Briscoe search for a gigolo suspected of killing an elderly rich woman and stealing a large amount of her jewellery, but as investigations progress, it becomes clear there is more to the murder than meets the eye. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A schizophrenic woman is found strangled, leading Green and Briscoe to suspect a homeless man of the murder. Taken into custody, he refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering himself incapable of standing trial for murder. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride spies on one of Hamilton's accomplices, but he is spotted, leading to a shoot out in a crowded street(n)

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: Garrett and the International Response Team are called in to investigate when two American entrepreneurs disappear while doing business in Bangladesh(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a teenage girl named AJ when a photograph of the crime scene is leaked on the internet. Initial enquiries result in the arrest of the victim's father, but concerns are soon raised about the legitimacy and motives of the therapist she was in the care of prior to her death. Stabler and Benson find a potential witness, but there is a problem - he is a 16-year-old heroin addict. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape case becomes more complicated when photos of the teenage victim are leaked on the internet - but in court, the trial is adjourned when the defence attorney alleges the girl retracted her statement and he has a witness to the event. Stabler is distracted from proceedings after he is informed his son Dickie has gone missing with his friend Shane - a bad influence with a history of drug abuse(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Chester Lake is suspected of murdering a police officer, and Fin's investigation into his history reveals he has been working with a freelance team solving cold cases. Details emerge that Lake has kidnapped the friend of a 14-year-old girl who was raped and murdered - but the focus turns to the dead cop as more evidence is uncovered. Drama, starring Adam Beach, Ice-T and Christopher Meloni(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull agrees to help Chunk's daughter, Anna, when her journalism professor, Chloe is sued by a dating app developer for trying to steal data for an expose she's writing about sexual assault cover-ups. However, the stakes are raised when the company alleges that she actually stole proprietary information and intended to sell it to a competitor. Michael Weatherly stars(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The jury consultant helps a doctor who crossed state lines to purchase a marijuana derived oil to treat her patients in Virginia, where the oil is illegal. However, the case is complicated when Assistant US Attorney Sylvia Banner (Dana Delany) has the DEA arrest her for possession with intent to distribute(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The jury consultant helps respectable family man Jim Grayson. who was arrested for changing his identity after being the unwitting getaway driver in a fatal robbery years ago. Bull hopes they can convince the jury that Jim has redeemed himself for his past misdeeds by living an upstanding life for years(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A car bomb kills an attorney who was working on a theft inquiry with Delko, and as investigations get under way, the CSIs are forced to look inside their own ranks to find the murderer. To complicate matters still further, Ryan is implicated in a case involving stolen diamonds, and finds himself taken into custody. Crime drama, starring Adam Rodriguez(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The murder of a former drug addict uncovers an insurance racket worth millions of dollars. Initially, a rock singer whose car was used in the killing is the prime suspect, until two femmes fatales come to the fore. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes, with Vanessa Minnillo and Kim Kardashian (who both starred in Disaster Movie) and Pat Monahan (from the band Train)(n)

programme.title: The Detail
programme.desc: Hall, Cooper and Currie investigate a case after a woman wakes up with a gun and finds her husband shot dead. Drama, starring Angela Griffin(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The detective investigates the murder of a chef who was addicted to sex after his frozen body is discovered at a processing plant. Laura heads to the restaurant where the dead man worked and realises its walk-in freezer is the scene of the crime, but the key to solving the case could lie with either the victim's colleagues or one of his partners. Starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the case continues, Assistant DA Antonella Ricci and eyewitness Billy Woodson's mother are found dead at a supposedly safe location, killed by Colombian drug-dealers working alongside the Russian gangsters. Drama series, starring Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a man goes on a shooting spree in Central Park, Briscoe and new partner Green pull out all the stops to trace the weapon. McCoy, meanwhile, sets his sights on finding the killer - and the person who sold him the gun. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Jesse E Martin and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Four sisters claim their father died on a boat trip during a storm, but with their stories changing constantly, Jessica's suspicions grow and she tries to ascertain whether they are guilty of killing him to benefit from a $100million inheritance. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury, Tom Bosley and Howard Duff(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the demise of a flamboyant hypnotist, who died behind locked doors in front of an audience of mesmerised journalists. Mystery drama, guest starring Jose Ferrer(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica takes over a congressman's seat in Washington while trying to find out who was responsible for his murder - but political shenanigans and sinister goings-on conspire to keep her from solving the crime. Mystery, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A separated couple blame each other for concealing their missing baby, but the discovery of bloodstains in their apartment suggests another, more tragic explanation. An angry Briscoe suspects the father of murder - until the infant's remains are found, raising the possibility that both parents could be responsible(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part one of two. Best-selling mystery writer PK Todd and her accountant are gunned down outside a restaurant. Miraculously, Todd survives but her companion is mortally wounded, prompting Briscoe and Green to launch a murder inquiry and discover the culprit's real target. However, they soon find themselves mixed up in a deadly case of jealousy and betrayal. Guest starring Ruthie Henshall and Tom Berenger(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team is unable to trust anyone in the city, so turn to the FBI for help in foiling the mayor's sinister scheme(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Burgess, working undercover to retrieve a batch of firearms used to kill cops, discovers her contact has cold feet. A firearms show in Wisconsin could hold a clue(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler fights to prove his partner's innocence when Benson is linked by DNA evidence to the murder of a member of a biker gang that specialised in assassinations and prostitution. Munch and Fin are assigned to the investigation, and as the evidence mounts, the detective's career comes under serious threat(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the death of 17-year-old Anna McWilliams and discover she was using an internet site to arrange one-night stands with strangers. Warner reveals Anna was HIV positive - as was the man she was meant to meet on the night she died. Had he been deliberately passing on the virus by having unprotected sex?(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives are forced to rely on an officer from another district when a rape victim refuses to talk to anyone except him, but Stabler has doubts about the trustworthiness of their unknown colleague. Introductions to the new ADA do not go well when she insists an interview with a suspect be brought to a premature close. Christine Lahti (Chicago Hope) joins the cast, with guest star Wentworth Miller (Prison Break)(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A friend from Bull's past enlists his services to help convince a jury that a domestic abuse survivor who shot her husband in his sleep is not guilty of murder because she feared for her life and the life of her unborn child. Michael Weatherly stars(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The team members fear that they're in over their heads when they take on the seemingly unwinnable case of Elliott Miles, a mute man facing the death penalty if he's found guilty of murder and arson. Elsewhere, Bull is stunned to learn that his ex-wife is remarrying(n)

programme.title: Ransom
programme.desc: A burglar holds a family hostage after they catch him breaking into their safe - but Eric is suspicious when he learns one of them has been kidnapped before(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Anonymous envelopes containing a series of puzzle pieces lead the team to the locations of two murders, where evidence suggests the killer is targeting people connected with a university psychology department. Unfortunately, the longer it takes the agents to solve the cryptic clues, the more victims will die. Crime drama, starring David Caruso(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A discrepancy at the murder scene of an 18-year-old woman implicates assistant district attorney Craig Hansen in a different crime. Stella interrupts a bail hearing to arrest him, but her intervention results in a suspected killer being released back onto the streets. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: The Detail
programme.desc: Stevie goes missing after looking into one of her father's old cases involving Alvin Flowers, who was suspected of killing three women(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The detective is torn between solving a murderous arson case at an apartment block and baking for her twins' school's winter carnival. While Laura takes some time off to make her stall, fire investigator and Jake's ex Angela Ryan (guest star Anastasia Griffith) takes charge of the case. Comedy drama, starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a civil court judge. Catching the man they think responsible, they bring him to trial - but the victim refuses to implicate him. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives are presented with a host of suspects while investigating the murder of a teenage drug user - and begin to suspect a member of her wealthy family could be responsible. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to San Francisco for her niece's wedding, but finds herself trying to prove the groom innocent of murder when he is accused of killing his boss, who had been refusing to pay him. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury, Jeff Conaway and Martin Landau(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A Broadway actress comes out of retirement to star with her daughter in a musical produced by her son - but soon finds her life in danger. Luckily, Jessica has been invited along to see the show by nephew Grady and decides to investigate. Guest starring Vivian Blaine and Lorna Luft, with Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica goes to New Orleans to appear on a chat show, but is sidetracked into solving the death of a famous jazz musician murdered while performing on stage. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The seemingly straightforward murder of a stockbroker plunges Briscoe and Green into the murky world of insider-trading and blackmail, as they learn that the victim led a seedy double life. However, their investigations take on a new dimension when the suspected killer is himself bumped off by a professional hitman. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a white teenager in Harlem seems like an open-and-shut case - until two patrol officers are implicated in the crime. As tensions between residents and investigating officers mount, the Mayor puts pressure on Schiff to make an example of the cops, hoping it will be enough to satisfy ADA McCoy. Drama, starring Steven Hill(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The American crime drama returns with the team still reeling from the Department of Defence investigation, with Ziva, McGee and Tony having handed in their badges. Parsons continues his inquiries into Gibbs and his agents, but events take a turn when an explosion kills the Secretary of the US Navy and seriously injures the director of Homeland Security. When attempts are made on the lives of Gibbs and Tony, it appears that all of the NCIS agents are in mortal danger. Starring Mark Harmon and Colin Hanks(n)

programme.title: Perception
programme.desc: Incriminating evidence stacks up against Donnie after Shelby is found dead, and Pierce and Moretti try to clear his name. Pierce's father is mistaken for Ruby's husband, who is a wanted gangster. Eric McCormack and Rachael Leigh Cook star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When wealthy couple the Gillettes are found dead, it seems a case of murder-suicide perpetrated by the husband. However, Cragen discovers the crime was a homicide, and Benson and Stabler have to tread carefully since the victims had generously donated to both a police charity and the mayor. Their daughter Anne claims a man has been stalking her, but he turns out to be a detective investigating her for fraud - who also suspects she killed her parents for their money. Guest starring Naveen Andrews (Lost) and Edward Hibbert (Frasier)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are called in when a woman working with a band is found raped and murdered, and their enquiries lead them to suspect they are searching for a killer apparently targeting members of the gay community. Their investigation is hampered by the interference of lesbian activist Babs Duffy, who has her own agenda. Guest starring comedienne Kathy Griffin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green go in search of a boy's killer - and are shocked when it appears a 10-year-old girl could be responsible. McCoy steps in, claiming she should be committed to a psychiatric hospital before other murders occur. Jerry Orbach stars(n)
